results.requirement_text: The system shall record the time and user ID for each successful login.

test_cases.title: Record login timestamp and user ID on successful login
test_cases.objective: Verify that a successful login results in recording of the login timestamp and user identifier.
test_cases.technique_used: Inspect audit log or database entry for login event
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Execute a successful login using valid credentials.
steps.expected_result: The system records the login timestamp and user identifier associated with the login event.

test_cases.expected_result: Login timestamp and user identifier are recorded in the system audit log or database.
assumptions: Exact login interface and credential format are not specified; assume a standard login process is available.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that after a successful login the system records the login timestamp and user identifier.
traceability.technique_used: Inspect audit log or database entry for login event

source_basis: record the time and user ID for each successful login
